response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (The video contains stream commentary instead of vocal music, so the reference JSON had no lyrics to match). 2. JSON Usage: The video's commentary has been manually transcribed and translated in full. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were configured to perfectly synchronize with the exact moments Ina speaks in English and Japanese, splitting her lines logically to maintain readability.

subtitles.original: And his... gaze has reached me.
subtitles.english: And his... gaze has reached me.

subtitles.original: Oh, I wonder if someone bought my regen bee.
subtitles.english: Oh, I wonder if someone bought my regen bee.

subtitles.original: But I need food. I'll get some carrots.
subtitles.english: But I need food. I'll get some carrots.

subtitles.original: Oh, that's what I was gonna talk about!
subtitles.english: Oh, that's what I was gonna talk about!

subtitles.original: Subaru-senpai promised me she wouldn't sell the egg.
subtitles.english: Subaru-senpai promised me she wouldn't sell the egg.

subtitles.original: そうそうそう、昨日。あれを見て、スバル先輩にDMを送ったんですよ。
subtitles.english: That's right, yesterday. I saw that and sent Subaru-senpai a DM.

subtitles.original: 「売らないと言ったよね？ ね？」って。
subtitles.english: "You said you wouldn't sell it, didn't you? Right?"
A police officer who tells lies...

subtitles.original: So basically I saw that she sold the egg, and I was like, "Subaru-senpai..."
subtitles.english: So basically I saw that she sold the egg, and I was like, "Subaru-senpai..."

subtitles.original: "You told me you weren't gonna sell it."
subtitles.english: "You told me you weren't gonna sell it."

subtitles.original: And then I was like, "I'm looking forward to the next Oozora Police episode!"
subtitles.english: And then I was like, "I'm looking forward to the next Oozora Police episode!"
But you know, if no one...

subtitles.original: ...買わないと、多分ね、スバル先輩が、
subtitles.english: ...buys it, Subaru-senpai will probably be like...

subtitles.original: 「いや、でも、誰も買ってないから...」
If no one buys it, her defense would be like, "But no one bought it, so it technically didn't sell!"
subtitles.english: If no one buys it, her defense would be like, "But no one bought it, so it technically didn't sell!"
